text: This app is so impressive! It feels like having a personal chartered accountant for all my financial queries and information. Everything is clear, reliable, and easy to access. I’m truly impressed with how helpful and efficient it is!

guys ihave loss 5L due to the techical issue in INDmony app on 2nd feb that day was unable to exit my position and i make huge loss & same issue has been accepted my CEO of INDmony by mail, now im asking for redound then they are saying NO we can initiate for refound Dear be careful while using this app.... good luck

I did a trade in options for scalping and then their server crashed and I cannot exit my order. I had a huge loss. I tried to connect with their customer support and still hadn't gotten any reply. worst trading platform. Update They first said that they will reimburse the amount that I have lost during their server crash then they said that they cannot reimburse the amount so they will give me 2 month free brokerage and they still didn't provide me that. So please never use INDmoney

Definitely this app is legit for me whatever others think. Full of features like MTF pay later, Networth tracker, Car or Bike tracker like it's pollution, current value and much more. I am using this app from 2 yrs it had no problem interface is pretty good. Charts are also good but sometimes lag but after update it's resolved overall the app is legitimate for beginners traders.

IndMoney Dev Team: 1. Please revert back USStocks>Explore immediately, you just destroyed a great quick-lookup page with confusion n more clicks. 2. Please add a Feedback and a Contact section n make them Visible. IndMoney Management: 1. Please employ some UX engineers before taking calls for such drastic UI changes overnight! 2. Use a Toggle Button for Old n New UI switch. Users should have right to continue with convenience, rather than being pushed to changes without options. Overall Great.

Whenever there's a loss in MTF bought stocks, the loss is deducted from the wallet but there is no place where we can check what is the total blocked amount against such losses in MTF. Please start showing this blocked amount.

One of the worst experiences. There was a technical issue on the app on Feb 3. And that is why, I've had to incur huge losses in F&O trading. Instead of helping me with this issue, the team has refused to issue any refund. This was very unacceptable since I'm forced to take this loss which wasn't even my fault in the first place. Not going to use it again, ever. It doesn't even deserve one star

I had given low ratings due to the recent update which wasn't a good experience. The Team reached out to me within hours, gather feedback and other information and assured me that they would be working on it. This is the kind of product that i would love to use. Appreciate it!

App watchlist is not syncing with website watchlist as I have only 4 watchlist in app but in website it is showing 6 watchlist. And try to add some features in watchlist like position changing from 3rd position I want a particular watchlist in 1st position. Developers please fix the issue. And also please give option to cancel or delete a particular SIP if a investor is not interest to invest in that particular stocks or ETFs. As I cannot delete US SIP ETFs.
Hi, is it possible to get more options to invest in other stock markets globally apart from the US & Indian stock market? like for example the stock market in Dubai or their real estate market?

When I was about to make a profit and sell it, it crashed. Their team contacted me regarding refund. But they closed it saying there was no open position at that time. I was in profit and about to exit when this app stopped working and when it started working i was in massive loss. so my question is how I wasn't in open position. they denied it straight and refused reimbursement. i have purchase history from that day and also sell history which was done next day due to expiry. Ticket ID 3035977

Best app I have ever used. It is an another level broker because it contains indan and US stocks which are really helpful. We can buy US stocks from India and its indicator are so helpful. Download this app fast and first when you create your KYC tap in first I choose US stocks because if tap on US stock you get $3 after adding 5000 rupees as me . Best app ever and the add money and withdraw is so easy

They froze a large sum of my funds from transactions and have been avoiding returning it, sending evasive, poorly written excuses over email. Customer service is terrible, hard to reach by phone, and email responses are slow and drawn out with unnecessary delays. I wouldn’t trust them with my money. Update: Promised my due amount in bank account, instead offering reward points for it.

I frequently use INDmoney for loan repayments, but I am disappointed that it doesn't allow partial or custom amount payments. Currently, the app forces users to pay the full outstanding amount at once. Other payment apps allow us to make smaller advance payments (e.g., paying 200 towards a ₹1000 loan). Adding a flexible payment option where users can enter their own amount would be extremely helpful for managing finances. I hope the INDmoney team implements this feature soon.

I am very grateful to the INDmoney app. I had recently filed a complaint regarding the arrangement of tabs in the app's UI, and I am truly amazed that, on the very next day, my issue was resolved. The team responded immediately, listened to my concerns carefully, and implemented the correction perfectly. Their work is truly exceptional, and the product designers did an amazing job. I must praise the INDmoney team for solving this issue so quickly and professionally.

worsr app. doesn't allow to buy fractional shares at limit order price. when you try to set limit order, it goes directly to number of shares and not the fractional amount of shares for the dollars we have. if we try to set it, it resets everytime. lost money due to multiple transactions on a single stock. and if you wish to buy fractional shares for the dollars you have then you have to buy blindly for the amount it is trading, no option to set limit order. was available before but now removed.

the Nominee Center is a mess! please use full names (instead of first name and last name) for nominees as most government IDs use full names. please sort assets in descending order of value in the main myIND page. INDpay UPI ID exposes our phone numbers, and there is no option to change it! and there is no way to delete goals!

My sincere suggestion again - referral rewards are still being processed on a manual basis . This simply means that the referee has to write , intimate and submit all details of investment done by his referral. It is tedious , time consuming and not practical . Referee is supposed to track both - the person he is referring to and ur app which is processing rewards manually. other apps credit rewards automatically

I am unable to add money into my wallet from the bank. Getting an error saying the amount should be greater than one. I logged a ticket 2 weeks ago with a screenshot and no response yet. Such a delay, I am feeling like opening another demat account with another provider.
The app is good but why are you changing the user interface so many times. It causes confusion sometimes. I use zerodha too and they stick to their one user interface that really helps.
it always want to fetch gmail as your email address, though i have other email as my primary email, this is a flaw , also securities are not easily searchable charts are outdated..

I love the app. The app is so much faster download. Thank you so much to everyone. This is syncing happens pretty much every time you open the app, start, stop, or edit an entry, so it was a real pain. But now download faster and more stable. Not to mention being unable to use the app when it's syncing because its literally stop responding until it's done. You'd stop an entry and it'd be several seconds before it'd actually stop and those extra seconds are added too the entry.

I love the app.! The app is so much faster download. But now download faster and more stable. Thank you so much to everyone algorithms. You’d stop an entry and it’d be several seconds before it’d actually stop and those extra seconds are added to the entry. Not to mention being unable to use the app when it’s syncing because it literally stops responding until it’s done.! This syncing happens pretty much every time you open the app, start, stop, or edit an entry so it was a real pain to use.

The account opening process is very easy but if you are going to close the account you will have to send the hardcopies of the documents. very lengthy process.so before using take this also in consideration.

App is glitchy and have fluctuations at times ( even yesterday as well the app was no responding for 30mins) in morning session. when you move from wifi to mobile data it takes 1-2 mins for data to get synced. many times the stop loss is not executed and not updated and refreshed after you modify it. also many times the stop loss dosent appear the orders. The issue of Stop loss has been observed many times. ticket raised without any resolution.

Himanshu Shinde 16 march 2026, I was having 37k rupee in wallet and i was earning 2k fno profit but due to app issue was unable to book profit i tried multiple time but it was not happened and price goes down also my wallet goes negative 31 lac rupee and trade automatically closed.i have screen shot as well and now team is duducted my 5k rupee and reverted my wallet 33k rupee and saying no issue happen so we cant credit you can shift to another plateform. worst app.

I love the app. Thank you so much to everyone. The app is soo much faster download. But now download faster and more stable. This syncing happens pretty much every time you open the app, start, stop, or edit an entry, so it used to be a real pain to use. You'd stop an entry and it'd be several seconds before it'd actually stop, and those extra seconds are added to the entry. Not to mention being unable to use the app when it's syncing because it literally stops responding until it's done.
I have raised a ticket 2 months back and the ticket is still not resolved . They keep asking me to send screenshots again and again but no solution is found. Ticket ID 2949013.

Checking some insurance options doesn't give you automatic permission to call me all the time. I never agreed to getting calls all the time. Then why the hell am I getting calls from you regarding insurance just because I was looking at it. If I wanted to I would have taken it myself. If I didn't that means I'm not interested in taking. So stop automatically sharing my number and using it to call me.
It is very easy to use and lots of useful features are available. I have used many apps but I love INDMoney because interface is very simple, fast and offers all and unique features.

money withdrawal problem, as per there app or site its takes 2-4 working days, i requested on 10th, it shows me 17 feb, [PHONE] working days but they wont transfer they will use sat sun and US holiday on 16th as an excuse, so beware ur money wont come easily to u, i doubt will mine come or any other excuse.... i tried talk to customer support they opened a ticket then closed it without solution or answer just keep me waiting we will call u in 15 min.

App is good but doesn't run on Android Tablet devices. works only with mobile devices. In US stocks category section like Large, mid and small has been removed. In f&o section scalpers mode there is no option for limit entry price on chart in web view or in desktop view.

This is a wonderful and trustworthy platform. The best thing is you can park all your investment Baskets under one roof, that is Shares, Mutual funds, Global equities, FD, account tracking, credit card tracking and bill pay, and lots more. seriously, I am waiting for IND Money to launch their IPO and give us a chance to invest in it's growth future.

trading experience in ind money is becoming worse from poor. Ind support team is full of cheaters if you raise any query message shows agent will call in 15 min and this 15 min becomes 1 day 2 day and then a week but no response and after that they close your ticket as resolved that's really shameful of Ind support team

I am not able to access external mutual fund data. I have followed the scan‑code steps more than 10 times. It always results in an error. I am getting frustrated due to this issue. Kindly resolve it at the earliest.

the refresh option of external portfolio has become absurd. earlier it was just an OTP and it automatically refreshed. now some QR code is generated and it has to be uploaded in the call function please revert back to the previous option

we didn't recommend to use this Application for trading in us market because they didn't provide any other option to add money his have a limited option 1. ICICI HDFC, AND FEDERAL BANK THEY not have UPI and any other bank like SBI , BOB , PNB, Etc

bhai log ye app third class se bhi ghatiya hai,,, krupaya aap log iss app se trading na karo bahut hi lagg karta hai... aap apna capital mat gamao... mene mera sara SIP cancel kar diya hu... capital gavana chahte ho to please please iss app se trading mat karo... it's my humble request for all traders....

1st major issue show what will be total profit or loss after taxes and charges in F&O dashboard or any format, it's deceiving to see when we make profit or loss which is shown on the dashboard is much lower in case of profit when we check the drop down where it adds up charges and taxes vice versa for Loss so fix this, it gives wrong assumptions and people may lose their capital. 2nd issue when we open tech charts or any stock or F&O when we are done with it and tap "x" it won't close ! fix ASAP

I used to prefer INDmoney for its simplicity, but recent updates have made the application extremely difficult to use. What was once a clean interface is now cluttered with half-baked features that make basic navigation a chore.

Reporting a UI rendering bug on the tablet version. In the top navigation bar where the active scrip tabs are located (e.g., HINDZINC), the text labels and the "X" close buttons are misaligned and overlapping. ​Specifically, any annotations made in this header/tab area are not showing up correctly or are being cut off by the UI layer. This makes it impossible to manage multiple tabs or use drawing tools near the top of the chart. Please fix the header scaling for tablet layout. Redmi Tab 2 pro
worst application. they are saying that they pay the bill and get a reward of 5$. I have paid a bill and didn't receive it. do not use and download this to waste your time.
this app is good , very good , but I have a request to the developers and brokers of this app , can you please decrease the brokerage fees per intraday trade , plz . every thing else is just smooth

I'm trying to complete kyc with federal bank for 3 4 days but unable to complete it. no agent will join to complete kyc . and if you raise the ticket they will just mark it resolved without even solving the issue. i could have given negative ratings unfortunately it doesn't have negative ratings.

Dedicated SIP tab at the top of the app. Under My US stock -> Details , Another SIP option Under My US stock -> Transactions -> A small SIP tab Under Order tab -> There is one more SIP tab. I dont know which one is exact SIP i can pause / modify the amount. Which one is right transactions details. Its 'SIP' every nook and corner of the app . Looking for modifying the SIP amount for last 30 minutes. Why cant keep things simpler.

Very disappointing experience with the INDmoney app. Automatic trades are being executed without proper clarity or control, which is extremely concerning for any investor. This creates a serious trust issue. Additionally, the support team is not helpful and does not respond professionally. Instead of resolving issues properly, the communication feels dismissive and unhelpful. Overall, this has been one of the worst trading app experiences I’ve had. I would not recommend this application to any
Looks like App doesn't want us to know XIRR of investments. There is no way in the app to see XIRR even though there is "View XIRR & Analytics" but clicking on it still shows absolute returns only

update: the team reached back and tried rectifying the issue Your app is very cumbersome for the mutual fund part. when I'm signing up for any SIP. you deduct the amount twice and i didn't even know that

“The app has useful financial features, but the overall user interface needs serious improvement. The font size is too large, which makes the screen look cluttered and uncomfortable to view. The layout and overall design feel messy and not well-structured. It would be much better if the developers reduce the font size and redesign the layout to make it clean, simple, and easy to understand at first glance. A more organized and minimal interface would greatly improve the user experience.”

I was the one who requested for dark mode in the app and thanks for fulfilling my request. However, I recently saw that IND Money shares our personal data to third parties.. Plz STOP this else like me many other users will loose trust and will discontinue your platform at earliest. SO STOP IT ASAP!!

Not much good app. Had some technical issues like on recent days I was in a Trade and Application got Crashed and I didn't have any option to square off my trade. My losses gone big due to technical glitches which is repeatedly seen till today.

I am kindly requesting you to update transaction history. Now we can get only last 30 days transaction. please expand it to view more or Set it up so we can select the date. it was too difficult to see the transactions before last 30 days. please
The recent update in UI has completely destroyed the app from being the best. Earlier it was easy to explore the market and stocks but now on it's a bunch of stupidity.

The greatest INDIAN app ever! Tonnes of features! The most feature-rich, neat & clean UI as well as easy to use finance app I ever stumble upon! The developers aren't stagnant, enhancements are constant! As a beginner investor, the family's net worth section helped me a lot, provided greater clarity and saved time on a lot of calculation & evaluation while allocating capital across different assets. Our family's investment journey is incomplete without this true gem!!!

Funds deducted but MF not credited or even shown as pending. Contacted customer support, Head of Client Servicing, and Compliance Officer—all routes lead to the same recorded calls and slow, useless WhatsApp links. Promised quick support during account opening, but now even a ticket with a 15-min callback got no response. Unacceptable handling of customer money. Not trustworthy.

Edit: The team was very responsive in addressing my queries. The app is amazing, works smoothly, integrates every kind of investment asset into one place, and acts as a complete net worth tracker. Would have been better if there was more clarity on when mutual fund NAVs are updated daily and if we had the option to hold funds in SOA format instead of just demat format. Nevertheless, a great platform!

Previously I provided 1 star due to clutter in the UI/UX experience but within a couple of days, I received a call from Mr.Chetan from the design department, and he collected all my feedback and provided assurance that all the changes will be implemented soon. I haven't seen any company that is contacting the customer and really trying to improve their platform. Kudos to Chetan for listening to the customer. and also it's good app to use Ind stocks, US stocks and MF at single unified platform.

Worst trading app experience. Frequent crashes caused major losses. On [PHONE], I placed an order at ₹66 with stop-loss ₹59, but it failed to trigger. I had to exit manually at ₹49.65. Orders often don’t appear on charts. Highly unreliable—do not use for trading. I also escalate the same to SEBI too

Warning I bought 15 shares ranging from ₹1 to ₹25 and when I sold them they charged DP Charges of ₹14+18% GST on every Share I sold. My wallet balance got in Negative. The problem is that They won't tell you all this before adding funds in your Demat wallet. Everything is hidden beneath FAQ pages if you dig. Invest in Mutual funds to avoid all hidden charges.

SUBJECT: Request to Improve Exit Button Safety and Add Commodity Segment The current one-click exit feature is very sensitive; even while scrolling through positions, an accidental touch can trigger an unintended exit.
